text: Name one tool you couldn't live without. I bet I can name a better one.
The best AI investment isn't tools. It's learning to chain them together.
Went through this exact process. automated research, writing, and posting in a single pipeline. Worth every hour.
This is solid. One question: how do you handle scaling past the first 100 users?
What would you automate if you could? Best answer gets a breakdown.
99% right. The one thing I'd add: perplexity pro replaced google for research. sourced answers, no seo spam. Makes a huge difference.
Built something similar. built a full content engine that runs while I sleep. Happy to share the workflow if anyone's interested.
This is exactly what I run. went from manual posting to fully scheduled in one afternoon. Changed everything.

this clicks. when I focused on giving my all in my work, I cut my content creation time from 4 hours to just 12 minutes. Wild, right? unspent energy is wasted potential. So yeah. go hard or go home.
what specific method did you use to reproduce the secret messages? i’ve been experimenting with different prompts in claude and haven’t hit anything that solid yet.
